parameters.content:
## Create an iFirma VAT invoice for every B2B Sellf purchase

### How it works
[Sellf](https://github.com/jurczykpawel/sellf) - a self-hosted checkout platform for digital products - sends a signed `purchase.completed` webhook for every paid order. This workflow verifies the `X-Sellf-Signature` HMAC header, keeps only purchases where the buyer requested an invoice and provided a NIP (Polish tax id), builds an iFirma `fakturavat` payload marked as already paid, signs the request with iFirma's HMAC-SHA1 scheme and creates the invoice. Success and failure both land in dedicated end nodes, so a failed invoice never goes unnoticed.

### Setup
1. In Sellf admin open **Settings → Webhooks**, add an endpoint with this workflow's Production URL and copy the signing secret.
2. In iFirma grab your login and the **invoice API key** (hex) from Settings → API.
3. Fill in **Configuration (EDIT ME)**: webhook secret, iFirma login + key, VAT rate.
4. See the red note on **Verify Signature** for one required n8n environment setting, then activate.

### Customization tips
Change the VAT rate or payment terms in **Configuration** / **Build iFirma Payload**. Wire **Log Error** to Slack or email. Selling on WooCommerce too? The same skeleton works - swap the extract step.

## Receive & Verify
Accepts the Sellf webhook and checks its HMAC signature before trusting the payload.

## Acknowledge & Extract
Responds immediately, then filters for completed purchases that requested an invoice with a NIP.

## Build the Invoice
Maps the purchase to an iFirma fakturavat payload and signs the request (HMAC-SHA1).

## Send & Log Result
Creates the invoice and records the result - or the error, so nothing fails silently.

## Node setting required
This Code node needs `require('crypto')`. Self-hosted n8n: set `NODE_FUNCTION_ALLOW_BUILTIN=crypto` in the n8n environment, then restart.

nodes.name: Sellf Webhook
nodes.notes: Paste this node's Production URL into Sellf admin -> Settings -> Webhooks -> Add endpoint.

nodes.name: Configuration (EDIT ME)
nodes.notes: ifirmaApiKey = the 'faktura' API key (hex) from iFirma -> Settings -> API. webhookSecret from Sellf admin -> Settings -> Webhooks.

nodes.name: Respond OK
nodes.notes: Acknowledge before processing - Sellf retries deliveries that don't get a 2xx.

nodes.name: Is Purchase?
nodes.notes: Only purchase.completed flows through - other events (and Sellf's test deliveries) are dropped.

nodes.name: Needs Invoice?
nodes.notes: Consumer purchases without invoice data are dropped - only B2B buyers who asked for an invoice flow through.

nodes.name: Extract Invoice Result
nodes.notes: The created iFirma invoice - wire this to your DB, a sheet or a notification.

nodes.name: Log Error
nodes.notes: Connect to Slack, email or a sheet so a failed invoice never goes unnoticed.
